name: xdm_conversion_overlay
description: Adds validated MP4 remux/transcode and MP3 extraction, fixed presets, structured FFmpeg progress, a cancellable sequential conversion queue, atomic output publication and post-download conversion workflows.
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Do not invoke FFmpeg or FFprobe through a shell
Do not accept arbitrary external-tool arguments
Preserve source and existing destination files on conversion failure
